basic_details.job_title: JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Anganwadi Workers and Helpers Posts
basic_details.short_information: Jammu and Kashmir Anganwadi has officially announced the Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers) and Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers) Recruitment 2026 with 9 openings. The detailed notification was published at the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 18 to 37 years and hold qualifications such as 10+2, Graduation, Matriculation, or 8th Standard can now submit their offline applications on or before 17-07-2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply offline are shared below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers): 10+2 to Graduation Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers): Matriculation or 8th Standard

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JK Anganwadi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:https://www.jkicds.com/ .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: JK Anganwadi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the JK Anganwadi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download JK Anganwadi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers): 10+2 to Graduation Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers): Matriculation or 8th Standard

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for JK Anganwadi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website:https://www.jkicds.com/ . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications for JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 is 17th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 9 vacancies announced for JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026, comprising 4 posts for Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers) and 5 posts for Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Sanginis posts?
faq.answer: For the Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers) posts, candidates need to have completed 10+2 or Graduation. This offers a good opportunity for those with higher secondary or graduate education.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the JK Anganwadi posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all posts in JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 is between 18 years (minimum) and 37 years (maximum). Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates are required to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026. This makes the application process accessible to all eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What are the selection criteria for JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 will be based on a Merit List followed by Document Verification. Candidates are advised to prepare accordingly.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form for JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application form for JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the official website. The exact link will be provided in the "Important Links" section of the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the JK Anganwadi posts?
faq.answer: The posts of Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers) and Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers) under JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Which district is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for Anganwadi centers in Chadoora, Jammu and Kashmir.
